title: LEGO Star Wars Captain Rex Helmet Set, The Clone Wars Collectible for Adults, 2023 Series Model Collection, Memorabilia Gift Idea for Him or Her 75349
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Features a highly-detailed LEGO Star Wars Captain Rex Helmet model set which allows fans to pay tribute to the 501st Legion Clone Commander
Relive spectacular scenes from Star Wars: The Clone Wars as you replicate authentic details of Captain Rex's helmet in LEGO bricks
Proudly display this LEGO Star Wars memorabilia model on the brick-built stand with a nameplate; makes an attention-grabbing décor piece
Part of a collection of LEGO Star Wars collectible helmets to build and display; includes picture instructions in print and on the LEGO Builder app
This 854-piece LEGO Star Wars set for adults makes a great gift for any fan, an experienced LEGO builder or a Star Wars LEGO helmet collector

The joy of building Take the lead on a creative mission Escape the everyday and spend quality time replicating authentic details of Captain Rex’s helmet with LEGO bricks. Made for display Pay tribute to a 501st Legion Clone Commander Display your creation on the buildable stand with a nameplate to complete a striking centrepiece that evokes memories of classic Star Wars: The Clone Wars scenes. LEGO Star Wars collectible Build your collection The Captain Rex Helmet is part of an assortment of collectible LEGO Star Wars build-to-display helmet models (each set sold separately). Explore the range and find what you want to build next. Previous page Captain Rex Helmet (75349) Treat yourself or give this 854-piece set as a birthday present or holiday gift to an adult Star Wars fan or any passionate LEGO builder. Clone Commander Cody Helmet (75350) Get into your creative zone and capture the battle-ready look of Clone Commander Cody with this detailed LEGO Star Wars helmet. Next page
